nasb.text: At that time the Lord said to Joshua, “Make for yourself flint knives and circumcise again the sons of Israel the second time.”

esv.text: At that time the Lord said to Joshua, “Make flint knives and circumcise the sons of Israel a second time.”

cnv.text: 那時，耶和華對約書亞說：“你要製造火石刀，第二次給以色列人行割禮。”

ccb.text: 那时，耶和华对约书亚说：“你用火石做成刀子，再次给以色列人行割礼。”
